description: All 3 compliance buckets (0–15%, 15–25%, 25–50%) are occupied with auditeeCount >= 2 each. All 3 top3LowPerformers entries are populated in each bucket. Zones list has 4–5 zones with varying lowComplianceAuditCount values.

All 3 compliance buckets (0–15%, 15–25%, 25–50%) are occupied with auditeeCount >= 2 each. All 3 top3LowPerformers entries are populated in each bucket. Zones list has 4–5 zones with varying lowComplianceAuditCount values.

Only the 0–15% bucket is present in buckets[] (the other two are entirely absent). auditeeCount is 6+. top3LowPerformers has 3 entries with very low achievedPercentage (0.0–14.9%). Tests zero-bucket skip for the 15–25% and 25–50% ranges.
Only 0–15% and 25–50% buckets are present. The 15–25% bucket is entirely absent from buckets[]. Tests that narrator skips 15–25% silently and narrates the other two in correct order.
Only the 25–50% bucket is present. auditeeCount = 3. top3LowPerformers has achievedPercentage values all between 25.0 and 49.9. 0–15% and 15–25% are absent. Tests that narrator mentions only 25–50%.
All 3 buckets present but each has auditeeCount = 1 and therefore top3LowPerformers has exactly 1 entry. Tests singular auditee narration within each bucket.
zoneComplianceOverview.zones[] is an empty array (no zone has any audit below 50%). complianceBuckets has all 3 buckets. Tests the explicit empty-zones phrasing in Bullet 2.
zoneComplianceOverview.zones[] contains exactly 1 zone. lowComplianceAuditCount is large (20+). complianceBuckets has 2 occupied buckets. Tests single-zone narration without comparative language.

zones[] has 6 zones with lowComplianceAuditCount ranging from 35 down to 5. Top zone has count = 35. complianceBuckets has all 3 buckets with auditeeCount = 5, 4, 3 respectively. Tests descending zone narration with high counts.

0–15% bucket has achievedPercentage values of 0.0, 0.5, and 1.2 (near-zero compliance). 15–25% bucket is absent. 25–50% bucket has 2 entries. zones[] has 3 zones. Tests explicit zero achievedPercentage reporting.
